description_long: This is a long, rectangular wooden bench with a simple, minimalist design. The bench is constructed from what appears to be solid planks of wood, with visible grain and some blueish paint marks or weathering spots scattered across the surface. The bench has no backrest or armrests, and its legs are formed by the ends of the main plank, creating a sturdy, block-like support on each side. The wood shows signs of outdoor exposure, such as slight discoloration and surface wear, suggesting it is suitable for parks or urban public spaces. The top surface is flat and wide enough to comfortably seat several people. The overall appearance is utilitarian, robust, and designed for durability in high-traffic environments.
description: A long, rectangular wooden bench with a flat top, no backrest or armrests, and block-style legs. The surface shows weathering and blueish marks, giving it a rugged, outdoor-ready look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bench, flat top, and both block-style legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile and thickness of the bench, with one leg visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the full length and both legs, with visible surface marks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and one leg.
